title: オグリのどきどきトレーニング

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap asked me to meet up with her for some
cardio training before the race, but to my
surprise...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tama and Inari told me that the scary rides are
the perfect way to train yourself up.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The excitement of a roller coaster will surely
strengthen my heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I suspect that this training won't be of
much help, I decide to go along with her plan all
the same.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm flying. Going this fast is shaking me to
my core... My heart isn't the only thing getting a
workout here...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Where am I? I thought I was on a roller
coaster.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Are those the Three Goddesses over there?
They look like they're doing a festival dance.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I wonder if the dance helps you get
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So... you sway from side to side as you break
away from the group, spin around, and then
speed up as you go around the bend.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
"Those who dance well, race well." Is that it? You
might be onto something there, Goddesses...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was in a strange meadow somewhere watching
the Three Goddesses doing a festival dance.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So I resolutely danced back at them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I felt so much power flowing throughout my body.
I've definitely grown stronger from it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a confident smile on her face, Oguri Cap
looks like twice the racer she was before.
